Athens Backpackers

★★☆☆☆
🏛️ Acropolis View🍸 Rooftop Bar
from €35 /night
Check Availability

Overview

Legendary backpacker hostel with famous rooftop bar. Social atmosphere and great location.

Who Should Consider Athens Backpackers

Athens Backpackers is a 2-star budget price-signal hotel in Monastiraki, with an Acropolis-view signal and a rooftop-bar signal. It is tagged for backpackers, budget, social.

  • Compare the area on the Monastiraki hotel guide.
  • See broader criteria-based picks in Best Hotels in Athens.
  • Compare it with other Athens rooftop bar hotels.

Amenities

Rooftop BarKitchenWiFi

✓ Pros

  • Super cheap
  • Great rooftop
  • Social vibe

✗ Cons

  • Hostel dorms
  • Can be loud

Location

Located in Monastiraki, 8-12 min walk to the Acropolis.

🏛️ 8-12 min to Acropolis
🚇 5-10 min to metro

  • Neighborhood: Monastiraki
